title: Heuristics
description: Schema for heuristics.yml. Validates the sidecar metadata file generated during compilation. Contains size estimates, token counts, and per-package statistics. Not part of the AI loading protocol.

compiled_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when compilation occurred.

packages.description: Per-package statistics. Local package listed first.

totals.description: Aggregate statistics for the entire documentation set.

entries.description: Total number of entries across all sections.

objects.description: Total number of unique content-addressed objects.

size_bytes.description: Total size of all objects in bytes.

always_load.description: Number of foundation entries with load: always.

sections.description: Per-section statistics. Only non-empty sections are present.

entries.description: Number of entries in this section.

size_bytes.description: Total size of section objects in bytes.

estimated_tokens.description: Estimated token count for this section.

packageStats.description: Statistics for a single package source.

entries.description: Number of entries from this package.

size_bytes.description: Total size of objects from this package.

estimated_tokens.description: Estimated token count for this package.
